Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a textual description of a hiring process and are asked to produce two POWL models one that captures the potential unfairness with an XOR branch for community affiliation and one without unfairness all applicants undergo the same cultural fit evaluation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Well break down the process steps from the description

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Steps in the process with activities 1 ReceiveApplication implicit but we start with the application submission 2 DataCompletenessCheck which includes a loop for missing information 3 SkillAssessment 4 CulturalFitCheck but in the unfair model there is an XOR choice between a standard check and a community affiliation check 5 ManagerialReview 6 FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We are to create two models

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 with potential unfairness After the skill assessment we have an XOR choice between two paths Path A Standard cultural fit evaluation CulturalFitCheck Path B CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives an advantage Then both paths lead to ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness All applicants go through the same steps after skill assessment everyone does CulturalFitCheck without any alternative path for community affiliation then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We also have a loop for data completeness after the initial data check if information is missing we request more info RequestMoreInfo and then check again until complete

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the activities 1 ReceiveApplication we can start with this but note that the description starts with resume submission and questionnaire 2 DataCompletenessCheck which is part of the initial screening 3 RequestMoreInfo for the loop 4 SkillAssessment 5 CulturalFitCheck standard 6 CommunityAffiliationCheck only in the unfair model 7 ManagerialReview 8 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note that the description says the process begins with resume parsing and an initial data check We can model the initial data check and the loop as DataCompletenessCheck if missing information then RequestMoreInfo then back to DataCompletenessCheck until complete

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can model this as a loop loop equals OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note the loop in POWL is defined as execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again So we want to check completeness A if incomplete then request more info B and then check again A So the loop is between DataCompletenessCheck A and RequestMoreInfo B

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: However note that we do not want to request more info if the check passes So we can use a silent transition to represent the completion of the check and moving to the next step

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively we can model the data completeness check as a choice if complete then proceed else request more info and then check again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But the POWL loop operator is exactly for this after A we can choose to exit or do B and then A again So we can set A equals DataCompletenessCheck and B equals RequestMoreInfo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We assume that the loop continues until the check passes that is the applicant provides complete information This is acceptable

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 with unfairness Steps 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck loop with RequestMoreInfo 3 SkillAssessment 4 XOR choice either CulturalFitCheck or CommunityAffiliationCheck 5 ManagerialReview 6 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description says that the cultural fit check and community affiliation check are two alternative paths This is exactly the XOR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness We remove the XOR and have all applicants go through CulturalFitCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck loop 3 SkillAssessment 4 CulturalFitCheck for everyone 5 ManagerialReview 6 FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Where data_loop is the same as above
